2 saman. Annar gerir og hinn hvílir. 10 mín tímarammi. Reyna að fara eins margar umferðir og hægt er. Hvíld á milli tímaramma eru 2 mín.

2b Skautari 2-3 reps á fót
2c Róður 3-5 reps
2d Slams 3-5 reps

name: EMOM Engine
preview: 20-min EMOM alternating monostructural and light strength to build aerobic base.

name: Tempo Endurance
preview: 30–40 min tempo work (bike/row/run) at 70–80% with technique focus.

name: Omnis Burn
preview:
Vinna í 30 sek og hvíla í 40 sek (2 x 5 sek transition) x 4 umferðir. Hvíld á milli æfinga er 90 sek.

Tímarammi 1
1 Hjóla KVK 300+ KK 350+
2 KB deadlift
3 Kaðlasveiflur
4 Róður
5 Armbeygjur

name: Countdown
preview: Descending rep scheme (e.g., 10-1 or 15-1) across 2–3 movements; push pace as reps fall.

name: Ascending Ladder Burn
preview: Climb reps or time each round; great for progressive overload while monitoring technique.

name: Descending Ladder Burn
preview: Start high and step reps down each round to maintain intensity under fatigue.

name: Imperium
preview: High-power intervals with strict work/rest (e.g., 40/20) blending strength speed and conditioning.

name: Centum Burn
preview: 100-rep anchor (e.g., burpees) broken into 10x10; between tens, insert 1–3 rep strength moves. Aim for 20–25 min cap.

name: Centum Strength
preview:
6 mín tímarammi. Hvíld á milli tímaramma er 2 mín.

Tímarammi 1
1a Goblet hnébeygja 10 reps
1b Róður 5 reps
1c Goblet hnébeygja 10 reps
1d Armrétta 5 reps

Tímarammi 2
2a Floor press 10 reps
2b Stiffur 5 reps
2c Floor press 10 reps
2d Armkreppa 5 reps
x 3 sett

Tímarammi 3 (Core)
3a Saw planki 10 reps
3b Pallof press 5 reps á hlið
3c Saw planki 10 reps
3d Mjaðmarétta á öðrum fæti 5 reps á fót

name: Charge Burn
preview: 10-min AMRAP blocks, e.g., bike 10 kcal, floor press 10, hip thrust 10, curls 10; rest 2 min; repeat with second superset (burpee/row/squat/push).
